metadata.name: RamaLama n8n Custom Node
metadata.description: Custom n8n node for RamaLama AI model operations (PROGRAMMATIC)
metadata.author: RamaLama Integration Team

icon.description: Custom SVG icon for RamaLama node - works with programmatic structure

containerUrl.description: URL of the RamaLama container service

model.description: The AI model to use (e.g., granite-code:3b, llama3.2)

modelPort.description: Port where the model will be served

critical_notes: BOTH compiled dist/ AND source nodes/ directories must be deployed
Icon files must be in source nodes/ directory for runtime access
File ownership must be 1000:1000 for container access

commands.build: cd custom-nodes && npm install && npm run build
commands.deploy: sudo cp -r /root/ramalama/custom-nodes/dist/* /srv/n8n/data/custom/node_modules/ramalama-node/ && sudo cp /root/ramalama/custom-nodes/package.json /srv/n8n/data/custom/node_modules/ramalama-node/ && sudo cp -r /root/ramalama/custom-nodes/nodes /srv/n8n/data/custom/node_modules/ramalama-node/
commands.full_install: npm run build && sudo rm -rf /srv/n8n/data/custom/node_modules/ramalama-node/* && sudo cp -r dist/* /srv/n8n/data/custom/node_modules/ramalama-node/ && sudo cp package.json /srv/n8n/data/custom/node_modules/ramalama-node/ && sudo cp -r nodes /srv/n8n/data/custom/node_modules/ramalama-node/ && sudo chown -R 1000:1000 /srv/n8n/data/custom/node_modules/ramalama-node/ && sudo docker restart n8n

steps: 10. Restart n8n: sudo docker restart n8n
regeneration.one_command_update: cd /root/ramalama/custom-nodes && npm run build && sudo rm -rf /srv/n8n/data/custom/node_modules/ramalama-node/* && sudo cp -r dist/* /srv/n8n/data/custom/node_modules/ramalama-node/ && sudo cp package.json /srv/n8n/data/custom/node_modules/ramalama-node/ && sudo cp -r nodes /srv/n8n/data/custom/node_modules/ramalama-node/ && sudo chown -R 1000:1000 /srv/n8n/data/custom/node_modules/ramalama-node/ && sudo docker restart n8n

common_issues.node_not_appearing: Check n8n Docker logs, verify file permissions (1000:1000), ensure both dist/ and nodes/ deployed
common_issues.icon_missing: Verify icon.svg is in nodes/RamaLama/ directory with proper ownership
common_issues.api_connection_failed: Check if ramalama-service container is running and accessible
common_issues.build_errors: Verify TypeScript compilation, check n8n-workflow version compatibility
common_issues.icon_not_loading: Try different formats: SVG (best), PNG, avoid JPEG
common_issues.permission_denied: Ensure all files owned by 1000:1000 in Docker volume

development.hot_reload: Not supported - requires Docker container restart after changes
workflow: 3. Deploy to Docker volume (dist/ and nodes/ directories)

success_criteria.node_visible: RamaLama appears in n8n AI section
success_criteria.icon_displays: Custom SVG icon shows in palette
success_criteria.functionality: All operations work (serve, bench, containers, info)
success_criteria.no_errors: No console errors in browser developer tools
success_criteria.docker_logs: No errors in 'sudo docker logs n8n'
